behaviors.description: The content passed to the summary-generation step includes data retrieved from all three sources.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary is module handoff: three source clients -> aggregation/orchestration -> summary input payload. A unit test of a single formatter would miss missing-source wiring bugs. Higher levels were considered and rejected: System is disqualified because behavior text does not require real network/OS effects (in-process fakes can reproduce omission bugs); Agentic/Workflow are disqualified because this behavior checks input assembly before model judgment.
behaviors.test_description: Wire the report pipeline with three stub source adapters returning distinct sentinel fields, run one report build, and assert the exact payload passed into summary generation contains all three source sections/keys.

behaviors.description: When one data source is unavailable, the report is produced with a `data unavailable` note for that section rather than aborting.
behaviors.justification: This is cross-module error propagation and fallback rendering (source adapter error -> orchestrator -> section note). Unit is too low because failure appears at boundary between fetching and report composition. Higher levels rejected: System is disqualified because unavailability can be faithfully injected via a stubbed adapter exception/timeout error without real network; Agentic/Workflow are disqualified since correctness does not depend on model output quality or multi-agentic sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Configure one source stub to fail and two to succeed, execute report generation, assert process completes, failed section contains `data unavailable`, and successful sections remain present.

behaviors.description: The narrative summary accurately represents the key values present in the input data.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on what the real summary model produces (factual selection/paraphrase of key values). Deterministic stubs would hide hallucination, omission, or misstatement failures. Workflow was considered and rejected: behavior text specifies one summary-generation outcome, not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run summary generation against representative real inputs using the real model/API and evaluate whether required key values are preserved correctly in the narrative (with repeated trials/thresholded rubric to tolerate non-determinism).

behaviors.description: A complete report — from data collection through email delivery — reaches the configured recipient's inbox correctly.
behaviors.justification: Failure boundary includes real external infrastructure (HTTP/API integrations plus email transport/inbox delivery). In-process fakes can pass while real SMTP/API/auth/routing/inbox behaviors fail. Agentic was considered and rejected: behavior text focuses on end-to-end delivery to inbox, not quality of model decisions; summary content can be fixed/stubbed for this assertion. Workflow rejected because no multi-agentic sequence is required by the behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Execute an end-to-end run against reachable test instances (or staging equivalents) for data sources and real email service, then verify the configured mailbox receives the report with expected headers/body structure.

behaviors.description: When the email delivery service is unreachable, the generated report is saved to a local file and delivery is retried on the next scheduled run.
behaviors.justification: Core failure is state handoff across runs: delivery failure -> local persistence -> next-run retry logic. This can be reproduced with module wiring, real local filesystem, and a failing then succeeding email adapter stub. System was considered and rejected because behavior text does not require validating real network stack semantics; it requires fallback/retry orchestration. Agentic/Workflow rejected because no AI output dependence or multi-agentic chain exists.
behaviors.test_description: Run cycle 1 with email adapter forced to fail; assert report persisted locally. Run cycle 2 with adapter succeeding; assert persisted report is retried and sent, and retry state is cleared/marked delivered.
